title: doratoxylon alatum
intro: Doratoxylon alatum, also known as the Philippine ironwood or iron tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines. It is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and phenolic compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Doratoxylon alatum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to treat various ailments, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as capsules and tinctures.
